data.title: Stella Chemifa Announces Change in Largest Shareholder
data.description:
Stella Chemifa ( (JP:4109) ) has shared an update.

Stella Chemifa Corporation announced a change in its largest shareholder, with Dalton Investments, Inc. now holding the largest share as of April 3, 2025. This shift in shareholder structure may influence the company’s strategic direction and impact its market positioning, as Dalton Investments increases its stake from 14.89% to 15.82%.

More about Stella Chemifa

Stella Chemifa Corporation operates in the chemical industry, focusing on the production and distribution of chemical products. The company is known for its expertise in chemical manufacturing and has a significant presence in the market.

data.title: Shanghai Turbo Enterprises Announces Fifth Phase Capital Injection
data.description:
Shanghai Turbo Enterprises Ltd. ( (SG:AWM) ) has shared an update.

Shanghai Turbo Enterprises Ltd. has announced a capital injection of RMB 10 million into its wholly-owned subsidiary, Sichuan 3D New Power Technology Co., Ltd., marking the fifth phase of investment. This investment aims to enhance the company’s operational efficiency, optimize strategic layout, and improve competitiveness by focusing on infrastructure development, ultimately benefiting the company’s future growth and service capabilities.

More about Shanghai Turbo Enterprises Ltd.

Shanghai Turbo Enterprises Ltd. operates in the technology and manufacturing industry, focusing on the development and production of advanced technological equipment. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is involved in strategic investments to enhance its market position.

data.title: Bilibili Inc. Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
An announcement from Bilibili, Inc. Class Z ( (HK:9626) ) is now available.

Bilibili Inc. has announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 20, 2025, in Shanghai, China. Key resolutions to be voted on include the adoption of the company’s audited financial statements for 2024, re-election of directors, and re-appointment of auditors. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it will determine the company’s leadership and financial oversight for the coming years, impacting its strategic direction and governance.

More about Bilibili, Inc. Class Z

Bilibili Inc. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and is listed on NASDAQ and the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. It operates in the digital entertainment industry, focusing on providing a diverse range of content including videos, live broadcasting, and mobile games, primarily targeting the younger generation in China.

data.title: i-80 Gold Corp. Announces Executive Transition as COO Steps Down
data.description:
i-80 Gold Corp ( (TSE:IAU) ) just unveiled an update.

i-80 Gold Corp. announced that Matthew Gili, the President and Chief Operating Officer, will be stepping down from his role, with CEO Richard Young assuming the President position temporarily. Gili, who has been instrumental since the company’s inception in 2021, contributed significantly to advancing the company’s projects, including the Granite Creek Underground project. The company has initiated a search for a new COO to continue its growth trajectory and maintain its development timelines, ensuring the transition does not disrupt its strategic objectives.

Spark’s Take on TSE:IAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:IAU is a Neutral.

i-80 Gold Corp’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, highlighted by negative profitability and cash flow metrics. Despite strategic initiatives and positive corporate events, the financial instability, bearish technical indicators, and unattractive valuation weigh heavily on the score. While there are steps towards future growth, the immediate financial and operational hurdles are substantial.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:IAU stock, click here.

More about i-80 Gold Corp

i-80 Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused mining company dedicated to establishing a mid-tier gold production operation through its strategic development plan. The company is the fourth largest holder of gold mineral resources in Nevada, with a portfolio of high-grade development and production-stage projects located in key gold-producing regions. i-80 Gold employs a hub-and-spoke regional mining and processing strategy to enhance efficiency and growth, leveraging its fully permitted central processing facility.

data.title: Braskem S.A. Files SEC Report Highlighting Operational Risks
data.description:
Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has provided an update.

On April 10, 2025, Braskem S.A. filed a report with the Securities and Exchange Commission, detailing its compliance with the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The report includes forward-looking statements regarding the potential impact of a geological event in Alagoas and the COVID-19 pandemic on its operations and financial performance. These statements highlight the uncertainties and risks faced by the company, which could affect its future results and stakeholder interests.

Spark’s Take on BAK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

Braskem’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, including high leverage and negative equity, which weigh heavily on its prospects. While technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, recent earnings call highlights show some operational improvements and strategic initiatives. However, valuation concerns and ongoing risks limit the stock’s attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on BAK stock, click here.

More about Braskem SA

Braskem S.A. operates in the petrochemical industry, primarily focusing on the production of thermoplastic resins, which are used in various industries including automotive, construction, and packaging. The company is headquartered in Brazil and is a significant player in the global petrochemical market.

data.title: Banco Santander Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
The latest update is out from Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ).

Banco Santander has executed a substantial buyback program, repurchasing approximately 13.7% of its outstanding shares as of 2021, with a total investment of 1,081,573,921 Euros, which accounts for 68.2% of the program’s maximum investment amount. This strategic move is likely to impact the company’s market positioning by potentially enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

Banco Santander S.A. is a prominent financial institution operating in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial services and products. The company focuses on retail and commercial banking, asset management, and insurance services, with a significant presence in Europe and Latin America.

data.title: Oxley Holdings Issues Correction on Director Appointment
data.description:
Oxley Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:5UX) ) has shared an update.

Oxley Holdings Limited announced a corrigendum regarding the appointment of Mr. Ko Chuan Aun as an Independent Director. The correction involves a previously omitted detail about Mr. Ko’s past role as an independent non-executive director at Koon Holdings Limited, which went into creditors’ voluntary winding up after his tenure. Despite this oversight, the Board and Nominating Committee maintain confidence in Mr. Ko’s suitability for the position.

data.title: Orkla ASA Completes Sale of Hydropower Portfolio
data.description:
The latest update is out from Orkla ASA ( (GB:0FIN) ).

Orkla ASA has finalized the sale of its entire hydropower portfolio, with Sarpsfoss Limited being acquired by Hafslund AS and Svartisen Holding AS. This transaction, which includes river power production assets in Sarpefossen and Mossefossen, has been completed following regulatory approvals and will impact Orkla’s accounting from April 1, 2025. The sale aligns with Orkla’s strategic focus on its core brands and consumer-oriented businesses, potentially enhancing its market positioning by reallocating resources.

More about Orkla ASA

Orkla ASA is a leading industrial investment company focusing on brands and consumer-oriented businesses. It operates with a strategic, long-term investment approach, combining brand expertise with an investment mindset. Orkla is headquartered in Oslo, Norway, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange, and reported a turnover of 70.7 billion kroner in 2024, employing approximately 19,000 people.

data.title: Attika Group Ltd. Resolves Key Legal Disputes and Awaits Court Ruling on Employee Claim
data.description:
An announcement from Attika Group Ltd. ( (SG:53W) ) is now available.

Attika Group Ltd. has concluded its legal suit with Terrenus, as the latter has paid the full judgment sum and the appeal period has expired. Additionally, the company settled its claim against Hao Mart, receiving the full settlement sum, which will not materially impact its financials. The court dismissed URS’s application for a creditors’ meeting, placing it into judicial management, leading to Attika’s claim dismissal. A workplace accident claim involving a former employee remains unresolved but is expected to be covered by insurance.

More about Attika Group Ltd.

Attika Group Ltd., incorporated in the Republic of Singapore, operates in an unspecified industry with a focus on providing products or services through its subsidiary. The company is involved in legal proceedings and settlements as part of its operations.
